spec.description: A quickstart to setup Prometheus Node Exporter with preconfigured dashboards, alerting rules, and recording rules. Mac OSX.

spec.title: CPU Busy
spec.description: Busy state of all CPU cores together

spec.title: Sys Load (5m avg)
spec.description: Busy state of all CPU cores together (5 min average)

spec.expr:
(
  (1 - rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="$job", mode="idle", instance="$instance"}[$__interval]))
/ ignoring(cpu) group_left
  count without (cpu)( node_cpu_seconds_total{job="$job", mode="idle", instance="$instance"})
)

spec.title: Node Exporter macOS
